title: Most Frequent Even Element
titleCn: 出现最频繁的偶数元素

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,2,2,4,4,1] Output: 2 Explanation: The even elements are 0, 2, and 4. Of these, 2 and 4 appear the most. We return the smallest one, which is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The even elements are 0, 2, and 4. Of these, 2 and 4 appear the most. We return the smallest one, which is 2.

testcases.input: nums = [4,4,4,9,2,4] Output: 4 Explanation: 4 is the even element appears the most.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: 4 is the even element appears the most.

testcases.input: nums = [29,47,21,41,13,37,25,7] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no even element.
